### 👤 User Persona

**As a** [Type of User]
**I want to** [Perform an action]
**So that** [Value/Benefit is achieved]

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] It does X when Y happens.
- [ ] User receives a confirmation message.
- [ ] Error state is handled if Z fails.
